strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeds the 15-year minimum, with MIT Computer Science degree meeting all baseline qualifications
Demonstrated technical leadership through multiple Staff/Senior roles, organizing Refactoring Dojos, workshops, and talks across various technical domains
Entrepreneurial experience founding GISCollective and working at early-stage companies; strong full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems
concerns: AI/ML expertise is severely limited and very recent (only 4 months at current role); no demonstrated AI products, platforms, or strategic work in the portfolio
Missing preferred qualifications of Master's degree or PhD in an AI-related field, critical for a specialized AI strategy role
Career trajectory shows generalist multi-technology background rather than recognized deep specialization in AI strategy or cloud platform advisory

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
No strategic advisory or platform strategy experience

response.justification: Bogdan meets baseline experience requirements with 20 years of software engineering and an MIT degree, and demonstrates solid technical leadership through staff-level roles and mentoring. However, the role explicitly requires "recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI" and strategic advisory capabilities. The resume shows AI exposure began only 4 months ago with no demonstrated products, platforms, or strategic contributions. This is a generalist technologist without the specialized AI strategy expertise and track record required for a principal-level specialist role.
